title: 春味社
theme: 民国南京·新剧社团秋瑟园连环命案
synopsis: 1914年（民国三年）10月7日，南京城郊「秋瑟园」。六年前「春味社」排演《金羊毛》时女主角悦绮离奇失踪，六年后社团重聚排演《米诺牛》，当日连发数条人命——无头尸体、浓酸毒杀、船首坠落——希腊神话中的死亡逐一上演。六名幸存的社团成员各怀秘密，真凶就藏在他们之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Nanjing, classical Chinese garden (秋瑟园), Greek tragedy theatrical costumes, oil painting style, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, autumn desolation atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Nanjing garden murder mystery. Desolate classical Chinese garden with withered autumn scenery, Greek tragedy stage props (bull head, ship prow), six silhouettes in ancient Greek hemp robes over Qing-era clothing, dramatic oil painting style, mysterious atmosphere
